'''Cary Porter''' is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] colorist. He worked on [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse's]] [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (TPB)|''Shadows of the Empire'']], [[Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition (TPB)|''A New Hope - The Special Edition'']] and [[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi - The Special Edition|''Return of the Jedi - The Special Edition'']] series, as well as the one-shot ''[[Shadow Stalker]]''.

{{Artist-stub}}
